sourceSummary.oneLine: Supplier approval package for BLUE_1417_MIDDLE_BLOCK, part number MKK-100101, dated 2025.04.17.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as a customer-supplier part approval record including revision history, raw material list, QC process flow, and product inspection criteria.
keyPoints: Applicable models are G1417CW, G1417FW, G1417CWP, and G1417FWP.
Raw material list identifies MG(AZ31B) for product appearance and Non-Chromate for product surface.
QC process flow is marked for mass production and includes incoming inspection, CNC machining, cleaning, buffing, Cromate/Non Cromate treatment, film removal, shipping inspection, and packaging.
Product inspection criteria require 100% inspection for appearance, dimensions, fit, and weight.

evidence.claim: The initial revision was established on 2025.04.17.
The raw material list includes MG(AZ31B) for product appearance.
The raw material list includes Non-Chromate for the product surface.
The raw material list references non-use certification for Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, and PBDE.
evidence.evidenceText: 비사용 증명서 (Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, PBDE)

evidence.claim: The QC process flow is for mass production.
Incoming inspection checks for no cracks, bubbles, foreign matter, or corrosion.
evidence.evidenceText: 수입검사...외관,"크랙, 기포, 이물질, 부식 없을 것"

evidence.claim: Shipping inspection includes a CTQ weight specification of 355 ± 30 g.
Product inspection criteria specify 100% inspection for appearance, dimensions, fit, and weight.
evidence.evidenceText: 외관,,전수 검사; 치수,,전수 검사; 형합성,,전수 검사; 무게,,전수 검사

evidence.claim: Accepted lots are stamped as accepted during packaging.
evidence.evidenceText: 합격 처리된 LOT는 포장시 합격 도장을 날인하여 포장한다.

evidence.claim: Rejected lots follow the internal nonconforming product handling procedure.
evidence.evidenceText: 불합격 LOT 처리 자체 부적합품 처리 절차에 따른다.

reviewFlags.reason: No external regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified in the source text; authoritySignal is general.
Approval number field appears present but blank in the extracted text.
Revision is shown with multiple formats: cover Rev. 00, revision history Rev. 0, and QC 공정도 Rev.0.
No external regulatory standards are cited; listed standards appear to be internal inspection, process, calibration, shipping, and packaging documents.
The source text contains spreadsheet extraction artifacts and minor OCR/spelling issues such as Produst/Part and Cromate/Non Cromate.
